title: charred light Syrian ricotta fold
description: A shaggy, charred Syrian-inspired dish featuring ricotta and a light fold, perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Preheat your grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
Brush the grill or grill pan with olive oil to prevent sticking.
In a small bowl, whisk together lemon juice, garlic, and sumac.
Add the chopped walnuts to the bowl and toss to coat with the lemon mixture.
Add the ricotta cheese to the bowl and mix until well combined.
Season the ricotta mixture with salt, cumin, and a pinch of sumac.
Cut the pita bread into 4-6 slices, depending on your desired fold size.
Brush the pita slices with olive oil and grill until lightly charred, about 2-3 minutes per side.
Spread a tablespoon of the ricotta mixture onto each pita slice, leaving a 1-inch border around the edges.
Top the ricotta with a sprinkle of feta cheese and a sprinkle of chopped parsley.
Fold the pita slices in half to enclose the filling, and serve immediately.
Repeat the process with the remaining ricotta mixture and pita slices.
